category_sources: source_facts.description says Delve is a debugger for the Go programming language; official GitHub README says the same.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use Delve as the project display name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository contains a Documentation directory and README links for installation, getting started, command-line options, and API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify Delve as a Go debugger with command-line documentation.
